All roles
☕Food & Beverage

Barista

Coffee culture in Nigerian cities is growing fast. This curriculum teaches you how to operate espresso machines, steam milk to the right texture, produce a consistent menu of hot and cold beverages, and keep your workspace clean and safe. Whether you're working in a specialty café or a hotel lobby bar, this course gets you ready.

5 modules
24 topics
Certificate on completion
XP & streak rewards

What you'll learn

  • Pull consistent espresso shots and diagnose extraction issues
  • Steam and texture milk for lattes, cappuccinos, and flat whites
  • Prepare the full menu of hot and cold coffee beverages
  • Follow daily cleaning routines for espresso machines and grinders
  • Manage ingredient stock and flag low supplies
  • Serve customers efficiently during peak hours

Curriculum

1

Coffee Fundamentals & Bean Knowledge

5 topics

Free preview
2

Espresso Extraction Techniques

5 topics

3

Milk Steaming & Latte Art Basics

5 topics

4

Beverage Recipes & Menu Execution

5 topics

5

Equipment Care & Hygiene Compliance

4 topics

Final Certification Exam

Unlocks after all module tests are passed · 75% pass mark required

Earn a verifiable certificate

Pass the Final Exam and your Barista certificate is generated instantly — with a unique verification ID that employers can check at intrainin.com/verify. Share via WhatsApp, LinkedIn, or direct link.

₦2,500one-time

Full curriculum · module tests · certificate

No subscription · one payment · access forever

This course includes

  • 5 modules, 24 topics
  • Module tests with 70% pass mark
  • Final Certification Exam
  • Verifiable digital certificate
